title: cyanocephalus selaginifolius
intro: Cyanocephalus selaginifolius is a plant species within the family Asteraceae, commonly known for its medicinal properties. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects and provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Cyanocephalus selaginifolius is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
